meta.title: 比较事物
meta.description: Intermediate comparison grammar and vocabulary in Chinese: 比, 一样, 越来越, and related patterns.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 초중급 비교 문형과 어휘: 比, 一样, 越来越 등.

explanation.en: 「比」(bǐ) means "to compare", used in comparative sentences.

questions.prompt: 「比」是什么意思？(What does 比 mean?)

explanation.en: 「A比B更〜」means "A is even more ~ than B", intensifying the comparison.
explanation.ko: 「A比B更〜」는 'A가 B보다 더 ~하다'라는 비교를 강조하는 표현이다.

questions.prompt: 「A比B更〜」是什么意思？(What does the A比B更〜 pattern mean?)
choices: A比B更〜(A is even more ~ than B)

explanation.en: 「一样」(yíyàng) means "the same/alike".

questions.prompt: 「一样」是什么意思？(What does 一样 mean?)

explanation.en: 「没有〜那么〜」means "not as ~ as ~", a comparison of lesser degree.
explanation.ko: 「没有〜那么〜」는 '~만큼 그렇게 ~하지 않다'는 뜻으로 열등 비교를 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 「没有〜那么〜」是什么意思？(What does 没有〜那么〜 mean?)

explanation.en: 「越来越」(yuè lái yuè) means "more and more", indicating a progressive change.
explanation.ko: 「越来越」(yuè lái yuè)는 '점점 더'라는 뜻으로 점진적 변화를 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 「越来越」是什么意思？(What does 越来越 mean?)

explanation.en: 「比」is used to form comparisons: A比B〜 = "A is 〜er than B".
explanation.ko: 「比」는 비교문을 만드는 데 쓰이며 'A比B〜'는 'A가 B보다 ~하다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 北京___上海冷。(Beijing is colder than Shanghai.)

explanation.en: 「比」forms the comparison, with the specific difference (一百块) following the adjective.
explanation.ko: 「比」는 비교문을 만들며 구체적 차이(一百块)는 형용사 뒤에 온다.

questions.prompt: 这件衣服___那件贵一百块。(This piece of clothing is 100 yuan more expensive than that one.)

explanation.en: 「一样」means "the same".

questions.prompt: 我的成绩和他的___，我们都考了90分。(My grades and his are the same, we both scored 90.)

explanation.en: 「没有〜那么〜」is the pattern for "not as ~ as ~".

questions.prompt: 这个城市___那个城市那么繁华。(This city is not as bustling as that city.)

explanation.en: 「越来越」means "more and more".

questions.prompt: 天气___冷了，我们需要多穿点衣服。(The weather is getting colder and colder, we need to wear more clothes.)

explanation.en: 「差不多」(chàbuduō) means "almost the same/similar".

questions.prompt: 这两个方案___，都有各自的优点。(These two plans are about the same, each has its own advantages.)

explanation.en: 「比」forms the height comparison with the specific difference following.
explanation.ko: 「比」는 구체적 차이가 뒤따르는 키 비교문을 만든다.

questions.prompt: 我弟弟___我高十厘米。(My younger brother is ten centimeters taller than me.)

explanation.en: 「难」means "difficult", fitting the comparison of problem difficulty.

questions.prompt: 这道题比那道题___多了，我做了很久。(This problem is much more difficult than that one, I worked on it for a long time.)

explanation.en: 「比」forms the speed comparison.

questions.prompt: 坐飞机___坐火车快很多，但是也贵很多。(Flying is much faster than taking the train, but also much more expensive.)

explanation.en: 「比」forms the level comparison.

questions.prompt: 他的中文水平___我高，他学了五年了。(His Chinese level is higher than mine, he's been studying for five years.)

explanation.en: 「差不多」means "about the same".

questions.prompt: 这家餐厅的价格跟那家___，都不便宜。(This restaurant's prices are similar to that one's, both not cheap.)

explanation.en: 「越来越」means "more and more", indicating gradual understanding.
explanation.ko: 「越来越」는 '점점 더'라는 뜻으로 점진적인 이해를 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 随着年龄增长，我___理解父母的辛苦。(As I get older, I increasingly understand my parents' hardships.)

explanation.en: 「更」(gèng) means "even more", intensifying the comparison.

questions.prompt: 这个手机比那个___功能多，但是也更贵。(This phone has more functions than that one, but it's also more expensive.)

explanation.en: 「比」forms the comparison of exam results.

questions.prompt: 这次考试的成绩___上次好，我很开心。(This exam's results are better than last time's, I'm very happy.)

explanation.en: 「比」forms the safety comparison.

questions.prompt: 虽然这个方法慢一点，但是___那个方法安全。(Although this method is a bit slower, it is safer than that method.)

explanation.en: The correct order is A比B+adjective: 北京比上海冷 (not 北京冷比上海).
explanation.ko: 올바른 어순은 'A比B+형용사'이므로 '北京比上海冷'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 北京冷比上海。(Beijing is colder than Shanghai.) — find the error

explanation.en: 「比」should not be repeated at the end of the sentence; the sentence is already complete with 比 near the start.
explanation.ko: 「比」를 문장 끝에 중복해서는 안 되며 앞부분에 이미 쓰였으므로 완전한 문장이다.

questions.prompt: 这件衣服比那件贵一百块钱比。(This piece of clothing is 100 yuan more expensive than that one.) — find the error
choices: 这件衣服比那件贵一百块钱。
这件衣服比那件贵一百块钱比。
这件衣服贵比那件一百块钱。
这件衣服比那件一百块钱贵。

explanation.en: 「越来越」must come before the adjective 冷 (cold): 越来越冷 (not 冷越来越).
explanation.ko: 「越来越」는 형용사 '冷' 앞에 와야 하므로 '越来越冷'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 天气冷越来越了，我们需要多穿点衣服。(The weather is getting colder and colder.) — find the error
choices: 天气越来越冷了，我们需要多穿点衣服。
天气冷越来越了，我们需要多穿点衣服。
天气越来越了冷，我们需要多穿点衣服。
越来越天气冷了，我们需要多穿点衣服。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 北京比上海冷 ("Beijing is colder than Shanghai").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '北京比上海冷' (베이징은 상하이보다 춥다)이 된다.

questions.prompt: 北京__________上海冷。(Beijing is colder than Shanghai.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 天气越来越冷了，我们需要多穿点衣服 ("The weather is getting colder and colder, we need to wear more clothes").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '天气越来越冷了，我们需要多穿点衣服' (날씨가 점점 추워져서 옷을 더 입어야 한다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 天气__________了，我们需要多穿点衣服。(The weather is getting colder and colder.)
